name: exo
systemHint: This external `exo` CLI is a daemon debugging/admin tool. Inside an Exocortex conversation, use the native `exo` internal tool for the current daemon. Use this CLI to inspect or control other daemon/worktree instances (for example with `exo --instance ...`), troubleshoot socket/protocol behavior, or transcribe audio, which the internal tool does not support. Run `exo -h` for CLI usage. Subagents started through this debug client use Exocortex’s global default working directory, so include the target absolute working directory in the task prompt when relevant.
